title: Kubecost Cloud Cost
description: A cloud cost record representing spending from a cloud service provider (AWS, Azure, or GCP), aggregated by account, service, provider, or label.

invoiceEntityID.description: Invoice entity identifier from the cloud provider.

provider.description: Cloud service provider name (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP).

labels.description: Labels associated with the cloud cost item.

window.description: The time window for this cloud cost record.

netCost.description: Net cost after discounts and credits.

amortizedNetCost.description: Amortized net cost spreading upfront payments over time.

invoicedCost.description: Invoiced cost from the cloud provider.
